statement: In every magma, Equation 800 (`x = y * (z * ((w * y) * u))`) implies Equation 1408 (`x = y * (((z * w) * y) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0767
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w y) u)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z w) y) w))
